node.text: Unfriend your search engine, it’s 2009. We move the goalposts on search with a smarter engine that knows what you’re really looking for – Bing. #Microsoft50

node.text: In 1995, Bill Gates' "Internet Tidal Wave" memo shifted Microsoft's focus to the Internet, leading to the rise of Internet Explorer and showcasing the importance of agility and foresight in tech disruption. #Microsoft50

node.text:
The future of AI isn’t just about power - it’s about precision and personalization.

Think about it: Would you trust a GPS that makes up random exits? Of course not. That’s why 2025 is all about making AI that’s not just smart, but reliable. 

The game-changer this year is all about customization. Imagine AI that adapts to YOUR needs, not the other way around.

This is the vision @microsoft is bringing to life - where AI safety isn’t about building walls but about giving you the tools to shape AI around your world. 

#AI #TechTrends #FutureOfTech #MicrosoftPartner
Just me and my water bottle. 🥹

node.text: Innovation starts with culture. This Black History Month, we’re highlighting the unique experiences and stories of Black and African American employees who empower us all to live by The Code of Us. Link in bio.
Where were all of you Zune supporters back in 2006? The Zune's legacy lives on through its influence on the design of Windows Phone, Windows 8, Xbox, and Surface tablets. #Microsoft50

node.text:
In 2025, AI isn’t just your work assistant – it’s evolving into a genuine companion that understands and adapts to you. 

Beyond basic tasks, these AI companions are developing emotional intelligence, picking up on your stress levels and adjusting their support accordingly. The best part? You’re always in control, choosing what your AI can access and do. @microsoftcopilot is pioneering this vision, where AI isn’t just about productivity – it’s about having an intuitive presence that makes your daily life flow better, giving you more time and energy for what truly matters. 

Welcome to an era where AI becomes a supportive presence in your world. 

#AI #FutureOfTech #TechTrends #MicrosoftPartner
It’s 1982, copy? Flight Simulator for MS-DOS takes off, setting a new standard for computer gaming and simulation. #Microsoft50 @msfsofficial

node.text:
Something major is coming to your workplace in 2025: AI agents. ​
​
Think personal assistants that can actually get things done – handling inventory, taking meeting notes, solving IT issues, all automatically. The wild part? You won’t need to code to create them (thanks @Microsoft 365). These aren’t just chatbots - they’re task-focused helpers.
​
The future isn’t AI vs us – it’s about AI handling the routine so we can focus on what humans do best: create and innovate. Get ready, because this shift is happening whether you’re paying attention or not. ​
​
Are you excited about AI agents?💡
​
 #FutureOfWork #AI #AIAgents ​#MicrosoftPartner
@thisisbillgates and Paul Allen's journey began with the Altair 8800. Their vision? A PC on every desk. Wild, right? #Microsoft50

We’ve partnered with @microsoft to enable you to remix A Film For The Future, the visual companion to Moon Music. The remix site uses Azure AI and Copilot to match your mood & choices to the films produced by over 150 artists, creating a version unique to you. Get involved at link in bio

Thumbnail credit: @teekenng

node.text:
Something wild is happening in AI right now that you need to know about…​​
​​
AI models are evolving in game-changing ways. They’re getting better at breaking down problems step by step (like we do), and here’s what’s interesting - take @Microsoft’s Phi-4 as an example of how smaller models can sometimes outperform the massive ones.​
​​
We’re seeing more options, better performance, and real practical uses - from handling thousands of emails to solving complex problems. This isn’t just tech talk - it’s changing how we’ll work and live. ​​
​​
#AI #Microsoft #TechInnovation #FutureOfTech​ #MicrosoftPartner ​

node.text:
#MicrosoftPartner Art Basel just got so much more fun. 

Using the Art Basel Companion powered by @microsoft Copilot helped me build a perfect itinerary for my week. My favorite part was the Art Basel Lens, which uses Microsoft AI, and helped me get to know all the deets of the art with just a picture! Please someone pinch me because I am now an art expert with this app.

node.text: Thank you @microsoft & @speedymorman for welcoming our VP @kenyatparham to the Microsoft House of Black TechXcellence to share the good news about SPILL’s chart-topping success, culturally competent moderation systems and spill some tea about the AI products we have brewing!

node.text: I’ll be yapping all day with @MicrosoftCopilot, which now comes with four AI voice options including Canyon, Grove, Wave, and Meadow.
It’s the parrot as a baked potato for me. 🥔 This wholesome carousel is brought to you by @Msft365Designer.

node.text: Take a journey into an imagined future 100 years from now with Visions of Nature. Created in partnership with the Natural History Museum London, Microsoft, and @saola_studio, the mixed reality experience gives a glimpse of what's possible for the planet if we commit to taking action today. 🌎
To empower everyone, we must include everyone. Explore our 2024 Global Diversity & Inclusion Report at the link in bio.

node.text:
We’ve come a long way since the Sony Walkman.

Two of the most influential figures shaping our digital future, CEO of @microsoft AI, Mustafa Suleyman and tech journalist @karaswisher talk about how the rapidly evolving tech landscape is like nothing we’ve ever seen before.

#LWTSUMMIT #Microsoft #AI
Do not disturb, they like to yap! 😅

mom, business owner, and superhuman. we had the honor of meeting Lisa Guadalupe Clarke, whose journey from El Salvador's civil war to Atlanta embodies resilience and determination. check out our Story to learn more about how she's advocating for her comunidad. ✨
We believe that electoral process should be open and secure. Discover how Microsoft is advancing democracy forward at the link in bio.

node.text:
My AI curiosity 🤝🏾 @microsoft 

We're living in a world where AI is everywhere and similar to how you keep up with the news, you need to keep up with technology. Luckily, I was invited to the Microsoft office in NY where I met with someone on their Responsible AI team to learn more

#MicrosoftPartner #explore #explorepage #exploremore #ai #articialintelligence #microsoft

¡échale ganas! 👏 meet Jimmy Davidson, owner of Bandido Solutions, a home remodeling company driven by Mexican culture and a passion of helping others. check out our Story to learn more about how perseverance and unity drive their business forward.

node.text: Meet Diana Gonzalez, a young mom who turned her imposter syndrome into a success story. 🌟 Now a Senior Cloud Solution Architect at Microsoft, Diana also gets to follow her childhood passion by writing for Fashion at Microsoft. #InclusionIsInnovation #PeopleOfMicrosoft
like this post if you remember the classics ❤️

node.text: With the resourcefulness of his Brazilian heritage, Daniel Martins, Xbox Loyalty Marketing Lead at Microsoft, is helping young Latin-Americans break into gaming through programs like Imagine Cup. 🎮 Discover more at the link in bio. #InclusionIsInnovation #PeopleOfMicrosoft
The prompt: a lion and a pigeon playing ping pong in an anime art style 🏓
Exceptional vibes all year. 🍂❄️🌷☀️

node.text: From overcoming family bankruptcy to building a brighter future, Gabriela Olmos-Hill, Senior Director at Microsoft, knows the power of community. Now she’s driving the business forward every day. 🌟 Discover more at the link in bio. #InclusionIsInnovation #PeopleOfMicrosoft

node.text: Say goodbye to the hassle and hello to seamless document creation. ✨

Be part of something bigger. Register to vote.

Find answers to your questions about voting and register to vote with Microsoft’s partner TurboVote, link in bio.
I’m not leaving. 🌑

node.text:
Hey cosmic ballers! Jewell and Bri here, and we’re
partnering with @microsoft to blend science with hoops. Let’s dive into orbits, rotations, and basketball!

Find the full lesson on the Microsoft EDU YouTube channel
saving these for fashion inspiration 😍 which one are you?
We’re proud to partner with BWT Alpine F1 Team on Race into STEM – a global initiative designed to empower the next generation of motorsport. @AlpineF1Team

node.text:
When @JohnSummit was an accountant he used Excel every day. Now his hit track, “Shiver” lets us all see Excel in a whole new way. Creativity is not just about how you show up, sometimes it’s where you do. Your Spotify media plan…now in sight, sound and emotion.

#marketingstrategy #marketingtips #excel

node.text: A Microsoft Paint masterpiece by @afsigned. 🎨🖼️
who they think they're emailing vs who they're actually emailing 🌻🌞
how I greet my work bestie who lives in a different time zone <3

We had a great time partnering with @4thFamily, the @WNBA and @jr.nba to host a STEM learning experience.🏀🔬 Students explored how STEM is integrated into sports science tools and techniques, and even got to create their own player collectible designs using Microsoft Copilot. Check out our Story for some of their designs. 💡✨
Two self-care activities you can try after work. Are you slide 1 or 2?
Happy #WorldWideWeb Day 💘
and then I'll be taking the rest of the day off for some R&R ✨🧁

[GIVEAWAY CLOSED] If this post gets 12 likes, we’ll give one of these @Xbox controllers away. Like and comment with #MicrosoftCheekySweepstakes for a chance to win. 👀🎮 Marvel Studios’ Deadpool and Wolverine, in theaters today. 18+. Ends 8/14/24. Rules at link in bio.

node.text: Trevor Noah’s final stop is at the Microsoft AI for Good Lab, where he speaks with Juan M. Lavista Ferres  on how AI is helping scientists understand the health of the Amazon Rainforest through sound.

node.text:
Every creative process begins with an idea—and that idea starts with you.

Designer is now generally available with new features that can help you create and edit like never before. 💗🎨 #MicrosoftDesigner

node.text: I know that look. 👀
What happens when the door flies open and trouble walks in? Creators from around the world share their stories created with AI on Unlocked. More at the link in bio.

node.text: How can AI help improve early cancer detection rates? Trevor Noah visited Johns Hopkins Medicine in Baltimore, Maryland to learn how scientists are training computers to detect the presence of a tumor often missed by the human eye.

node.text: Should I have my coworker VO a day in the life of my cat next?

The Reheat with Keith Lee is just the beginning. 🎬

Together, we partnered with three chefs to integrate Microsoft Copilot into their culinary success stories after experiencing the Keith Lee effect. We can't wait for where their journey will take them (and us) next. 🚀
